LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT SCIF'S DEMURRER TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE INSURANCE POLICY ATTACHED TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT UNAMBIGUOUSLY ESTABLISHES THAT THERE IS NO COVERAGE FOR A LABOR CODE 132A CLAIM. ADDITIONALLY, AS A MATTER OF LAW, THE MIXED ACTION RULE DOES NOT ENTITLE PLAINTIFF TO THE DAMAGES IT SEEKS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Court'S Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SAMUEL TREANOR, ESQ. of Law Offices of Mattaniah Eytan, Tel No. 415-399-1000 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ERIC P. JONES, ESQ. of State Compensation Insurance Fund, Tel No. 925-523-5186 appearing for Defendant State Compensation Insurance Fund.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: As to DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendant SCIF's demurrer to both causes of action in the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. The insurance policy attached to the first amended complaint unambiguously establishes that there is no coverage for a Labor Code 132a claim. Additionally, as a matter of law, the mixed action rule does not entitle Plaintiff to the damages it seeks. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Apr-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Dec-16-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
